name: Team Bennet
subject: The reviews are in (don't just take our word for it!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| _**" I support Michael Bennet because I want a president who can build a future for our children and grandchildren"** \- Carol Bartles

"I think Michael's ideas can be paid for. A lot of candidates are for Medicare for All, and I don't think we can afford it. His public option healthcare plan makes more sense." \- Margaret Schmitz

**" I support Michael because he is a realist. We need someone who is familiar with government and able to put things back on track. I think his ideas resonate with people and that's going to go a long way."** \- Ed Brown

"There are a number of things that impress me about Michael Bennet. His background includes law, business, and perhaps most impressive, the job of superintendent of the Denver Public Schools." \- Jeff Harris

**" Since an American education is an equalizer of opportunity, I believe we need a candidate who can connect the dots between economic progress and the needs of young people as future citizens."** \- Dr. Kesho Scott_
Team -- voters on the ground are lining up to support Michael.

[There's one thing constant among these testimonials: Voters love Michael's focus on sustainable solutions, not viral slogans.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae01/134673f2/a77d6cf/6997da93/2654355357/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B2_111219_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Markey Campaign HQ
subject: Get out of the way, or you're going to lose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Team,

The elections across the country this month sent huge red flags through the ranks of the GOP.

Voters stood up and made their voices heard on the issues that matter most.

They rejected the NRA's bought and paid for politicians, and tossed out Big Oil's puppets.

**The message for 2020 is clear: Get out of the way of progress or lose your seats.**

And with Ed up for reelection, we need to make sure he continues the fight for us in the Senate.

[_**We 've set a goal to raise $25,000 before the end of the week. With two opponents in this primary race, every goal matters to ensure victory. Will you pitch in $27 or more to stand with Ed?**_](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-november2019-weekly?refcode=EM-111219_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Ed is fighting for the progressive issues that the people of Massachusetts and Americans across the country are demanding.

From the Green New Deal to gun safety, reproductive freedom, immigrant rights, and economic inequality, Ed is on the front lines leading a political revolution to the power away from special interests and return it to the people.

**But Ed can 't fight these battles on his own. We need the power of our grassroots team behind us. That includes you, friend.**

_**[Will you chip in $27 or more to help us reach this week's goal and keep Ed in the fight for our progressive values?](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-november2019-weekly?refcode=EM-111219_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

| | I need to be completely honest: I only have 24 hours to secure my spot in the next debate -- _and as of 6pm, it looks like I might not make it._ **[_Together we 've beat the odds time and time again -- but right now, I need you more than ever. Will you rush $5 before midnight so I can fund my final 24-hour push and make the cut before time runs out? >>_](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191112_em_fr_b3_castro_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")** This isn't just about one debate. We need someone on that stage who is a voice for the voiceless. We need someone on that stage who values diversity. We need someone on the stage who knows... you shouldn't have to be a billionaire to become president. I can honestly say that these next 24 hours are the most important of my campaign. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc820/3eb3e2fc/56920d14/744d9e91/4048060632/VEsHBQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc820/3eb3e2fc/56920d14/744d9e90/4048060632/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc820/3eb3e2fc/56920d14/744d9e9f/4048060632/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: WATCH: President Trump attends ‘America’s Parade’ in New York City
body:
President Donald J. Trump spoke at New York City’s historic Veterans Day parade yesterday, becoming the first President to do so... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f9727699f1&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • November 12, 2019
---
| | |
# **WATCH: President Trump attends ‘America’s Parade’ in New York City**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5aa3bd637c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **President Donald J. Trump** spoke at New York City’s historic Veterans Day parade yesterday, becoming the first sitting President to do so in the event’s 100-year history.

**“Today,** we come together as one nation to salute the veterans of the United States Armed Forces—the greatest warriors to ever walk the face of the Earth,” he said.

**Once a year,** thousands of patriotic Americans line the streets of Manhattan on Veterans Day. The tradition dates back to 1919, when people filled block after block to welcome home General John Pershing and 25,000 American soldiers after the Allies’ victory in World War I. Every year since, citizens across our country come together on November 11, marking the day the Armistice was signed in 1918 to end the Great War.

**“Our veterans** **risked** everything for us. Now it is our duty to serve and protect them every single day of our lives,” the President said.

**The Trump Administration** has worked tirelessly to keep that promise by reforming the VA to serve our heroes better. So far, President Trump has:
* Secured $86.5 billion for the VA, the largest funding bill in Department history

* Signed the VA Accountability and Whistleblower Protection Act into law, which makes it easier to prevent scandal, fraud, and waste by bureaucrats

* Created a White House VA Hotline, active 24 hours a day and 7 days a week

* Signed the VA MISSION Act, a sweeping reform of the entire VA system

**“To every veteran** here today and all across our land: You are America’s greatest living heroes and we will cherish you now, always, and forever,” the President said.

[More: Vice President Pence speaks at Arlington National Cemetery](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e73f2aa7f7&e=3ee4985eea)

**MUST READ:** [“The 1995 NYC Veterans Day Parade Had $1.21 In The Bank. Then Donald Trump Stepped In”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=49c149ace7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **President Trump: We chose to reject ‘American decline’**

**Before heading back** to Washington today, President Trump spoke at the Economic Club of New York, where he shared more good news about the booming blue-collar, middle-class Trump Economy.

**🎬****President Trump:** [Blue-collar jobs are back and leading the way!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fb022008d2&e=3ee4985eea)

**“I never believed** for one moment that our magnificent nation was destined for a diminished future. I knew that our destiny was in our own hands—that we could choose to reject a future of American decline, and to build a future of American dominance,” the President said.

**America’s economic future** looked bleak before President Trump took office—and that was according to the last Administration’s own “experts.” Their game plan was to provide cover for Washington’s globalist policies that produced stagnation, a shrinking middle class, and the rapid decline of our nation’s manufacturing sector.

**The “new normal”** is the phrase those experts came up with. Fortunately, the American people didn’t buy it—and they elected a new leader who didn’t buy it, either.

**“I refused to accept** that Americans had to lower their expectations or give up on their dreams,” President Trump said today. The results speak volumes: Nearly 7 million new jobs have already been created since his election, outpacing the “expert” predictions of fewer than 2 million. America’s unemployment rate recently hit its lowest mark in more than 50 years, with the lowest rates _ever_ for African Americans and Hispanic Americans.

**“Today,** I am proud to stand before you as President of the United States to report that we have delivered on our promises and exceeded our expectations by a very wide margin.”

[In case you missed it: African-American unemployment rate hits record low!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1b27b28785&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---

clean_body: President Donald J. Trump spoke at New York City’s historic Veterans Day parade yesterday, becoming the first President to do so... | | | | | The White House • November 12, 2019 | | | WATCH: President Trump attends ‘America’s Parade’ in New York City | | President Donald J. Trump spoke at New York City’s historic Veterans Day parade yesterday, becoming the first sitting President to do so in the event’s 100-year history. “Today, we come together as one nation to salute the veterans of the United States Armed Forces—the greatest warriors to ever walk the face of the Earth,” he said. Once a year, thousands of patriotic Americans line the streets of Manhattan on Veterans Day. The tradition dates back to 1919, when people filled block after block to welcome home General John Pershing and 25,000 American soldiers after the Allies’ victory in World War I. Every year since, citizens across our country come together on November 11, marking the day the Armistice was signed in 1918 to end the Great War. “Our veterans risked everything for us. Now it is our duty to serve and protect them every single day of our lives,” the President said. The Trump Administration has worked tirelessly to keep that promise by reforming the VA to serve our heroes better. So far, President Trump has: Secured $86.5 billion for the VA, the largest funding bill in Department history Signed the VA Accountability and Whistleblower Protection Act into law, which makes it easier to prevent scandal, fraud, and waste by bureaucrats Created a White House VA Hotline, active 24 hours a day and 7 days a week Signed the VA MISSION Act, a sweeping reform of the entire VA system “To every veteran here today and all across our land: You are America’s greatest living heroes and we will cherish you now, always, and forever,” the President said. MUST READ: | | President Trump: We chose to reject ‘American decline’ Before heading back to Washington today, President Trump spoke at the Economic Club of New York, where he shared more good news about the booming blue-collar, middle-class Trump Economy. 🎬President Trump: “I never believed for one moment that our magnificent nation was destined for a diminished future. I knew that our destiny was in our own hands—that we could choose to reject a future of American decline, and to build a future of American dominance,” the President said. America’s economic future looked bleak before President Trump took office—and that was according to the last Administration’s own “experts.” Their game plan was to provide cover for Washington’s globalist policies that produced stagnation, a shrinking middle class, and the rapid decline of our nation’s manufacturing sector. The “new normal” is the phrase those experts came up with. Fortunately, the American people didn’t buy it—and they elected a new leader who didn’t buy it, either. “I refused to accept that Americans had to lower their expectations or give up on their dreams,” President Trump said today. The results speak volumes: Nearly 7 million new jobs have already been created since his election, outpacing the “expert” predictions of fewer than 2 million. America’s unemployment rate recently hit its lowest mark in more than 50 years, with the lowest rates ever for African Americans and Hispanic Americans. “Today, I am proud to stand before you as President of the United States to report that we have delivered on our promises and exceeded our expectations by a very wide margin.” | | Photo of the Day | Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead | President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump participate in a wreath laying at the New York City Veterans Day Parade | November 11, 2019 | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: Alert (New Hampshire Senate race)
subject: did you see this re. Jeanne Shaheen?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi, this is important: **Last week, Corey Lewandowski met with Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump on Air Force One. They were plotting their campaign to buy New Hampshire 's other Senate seat and preserve Republicans' grip on the U.S. Senate.**
This came on the heels of Lewandowski's closed-door meeting with New Hampshire Governor Chris Sununu about his strategy to defeat Jeanne and turn New Hampshire red.
It's clear that GOP insiders are lining up behind Lewandowski, the man who put Trump in the White House. The idea of "Senator Lewandowski" is terrifying -- he would rubber-stamp all the worst parts of Trump's agenda, from repealing the Affordable Care Act to confirming ultraconservative Supreme Court justices.
That's why we can't waste a second in fighting back, everyone. **With everyone from FiveThirtyEight to Roll Call saying that losing in New Hampshire would mean handing Republicans Senate control for another two years, the stakes here couldn 't be higher. The GOP is pouring everything it has into defeating Jeanne, and she's counting on your help to fight back.**
[**Please rush $3 or more right now -- whatever you can spare to help Jeanne -- to take back the Senate for Democrats and stop the GOP, Corey Lewandowski, and everyone lining up behind him from turning New Hampshire's Senate seat red.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc325/2a380d31/3d3e1fc3/f0e8b9/1804015703/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Y2pzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxOTExMTJfTVdINENKU182bW8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4cjs?refcode=e20191112_MWH4CJS_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

name: Warren for President
subject: Share your story: What can two cents do for you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Billionaires have spent the past week going on national television to talk about how they think the tax that would make them pay their fair share is a bad idea (no surprise there)... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528807/45c30650/10419b991/66f47fbc/2425655305/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
You might've heard Elizabeth talk about everything we can do with the Ultra-Millionaire Tax -- from Universal Child Care to cancelling student loan debt.

**Billionaires have spent the past week going on national television to talk about how they think the tax that would make them pay their fair share is a bad idea (no surprise there).

We've heard enough from them. Now, we want to hear from you. What would the Ultra-Millionaire Tax mean for you and those you love?**

**[Click here to share your story about what the Ultra-Millionaire Tax would mean for you.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528807/45c30650/10419b991/66f47fbf/2425655305/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUw1MlBfRUdSX1NIUl9QXzIwMTkxMTEyX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-umt-story-share?source=EML52P_EGR_SHR_P_20191112_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

What can two cents do? To help with your brainstorming, here's a list of what the Ultra-Millionaire Tax would pay for:
* Universal Child Care and universal pre-K for every baby in this country aged zero to five
* Raising the wages of every child care worker in America
* Adequate and equitable funding for public schools so every child can get a great public education
* Universal free public college and technical schools
* Investing at least $50 billion in Historically Black Colleges and Universities and Minority-Serving Institutions
* Canceling student loan debt for 95% of the Americans who have it

We know the real costs of our education aren't easily found in a calculator. So we wanted to ask: What dreams have you -- or your friend, or your child -- deferred because of student loan debt?

What risks would you take if you didn't have to worry about safe, affordable child care?

And if you're a child care professional, what would that extra money in your paycheck -- and recognition as an educator -- mean for you or someone you love?

**By sharing our stories, we can show the real, human costs of our current system. And together, we make the case for why we can't afford to not have an Ultra-Millionaire Tax.**

**[Click here to share your story about how these policies would impact you and your family. When we raise our voices together, we build a movement to help turn them into reality.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528807/45c30650/10419b991/66f47fbf/2425655305/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUw1MlBfRUdSX1NIUl9QXzIwMTkxMTEyX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-umt-story-share?source=EML52P_EGR_SHR_P_20191112_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Thanks again for all you do,

Team Warren
| [**SHARE YOUR STORY**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528807/45c30650/10419b991/66f47fbf/2425655305/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUw1MlBfRUdSX1NIUl9QXzIwMTkxMTEyX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-umt-story-share?source=EML52P_EGR_SHR_P_20191112_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

body:
| Dear Peter,

**The Dem's public impeachment hearings -- headed by Adam Schiff -- are beginning this morning.** They're out to impeach and remove President Trump less than 1 year from the 2020 elections because they KNOW they cannot defeat him at the ballot box.

We're 100% committed to defending President Trump and fighting this sham impeachment, but [**we need your urgent financial support**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53457524:WJjyvQvNM:m:1:2185159506:0CB798E23B1B2348A82D22DD3D4F58AE:r) because this battle is not being fought in Washington... It's being fought on TVs, computer and phone screens, newspapers (yes they still print them), and radios across America.

We MUST counter the Dem's ultimate anti-Trump blitz, but we cannot do it alone.

Your current record says you haven't given to the impeachment defense fund.

If you still support President Trump, please act before midnight tonight (Nov 13th).

name: Hillsdale College
subject: Jefferson’s favorite commentary
body:
During recent events in politics, I've seen a recurring theme from the Progressive movement. The Left insists that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is flawed and outdated. How should defenders of the Constitution respond to such charges?
| | | [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-ZwTVCoz5GpbBFTXJLG9NEargg3KoQ_fRRZ9ZlyJoRMoBHKgMKzmFYkB8J7iqD1jtQgLeMUx9p4v7LRIlXLqgg5-8RkUdkJCrinHaqYnmRKdDutn3JaTxB7KrFXDMSot0HRsyPL6DKjBZPXCxbF1wSroo0MwWPIrWFVpFjwdv8Z8kAuEFFM9rmb3D-8B-X8iiCwXxN_1J_VkUhb4AZ3IaND0qKTAe0-3EnKlFCt4BtO_PD796C0fquH54rqQiWjE3LKu7Yeo8WjDq69o7_EE14Z-uzRQzXUgle7Jj-_K3RdUpYFt0pi9TSfdkVEcoH10_2T5b7Qhq5t41dx8lLz88I0eCELGFCS3VZjHtgY7gUgfSrkji0wMOh2xIX0jmDa_xui4i__fE3g=&c=_lGv5pzCJL0SsnX91DRxOvNyeF7fIZvcj3YykX4892q1IkhLOxnsAA==&ch=J22tCncrQVP0u1W8IDnjbV17ntz1CrV256NGk5ctkpGWhswcWX7Yyg==) Dear Fellow American, During recent events in politics, I've seen a recurring theme from the Progressive movement. The Left insists that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is flawed and outdated. [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-ZwTVCoz5GpbBFTXJLG9NEargg3KoQ_fRRZ9ZlyJoRMoBHKgMKzmFYkB8J7iqD1jtQgLeMUx9p4v7LRIlXLqgg5-8RkUdkJCrinHaqYnmRKdDutn3JaTxB7KrFXDMSot0HRsyPL6DKjBZPXCxbF1wSroo0MwWPIrWFVpFjwdv8Z8kAuEFFM9rmb3D-8B-X8iiCwXxN_1J_VkUhb4AZ3IaND0qKTAe0-3EnKlFCt4BtO_PD796C0fquH54rqQiWjE3LKu7Yeo8WjDq69o7_EE14Z-uzRQzXUgle7Jj-_K3RdUpYFt0pi9TSfdkVEcoH10_2T5b7Qhq5t41dx8lLz88I0eCELGFCS3VZjHtgY7gUgfSrkji0wMOh2xIX0jmDa_xui4i__fE3g=&c=_lGv5pzCJL0SsnX91DRxOvNyeF7fIZvcj3YykX4892q1IkhLOxnsAA==&ch=J22tCncrQVP0u1W8IDnjbV17ntz1CrV256NGk5ctkpGWhswcWX7Yyg==)How should defenders of the Constitution respond to such charges? Well, a few early defenders of the Constitution-Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison-have given us the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as "the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written." There is no better aid to understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **That's why I'd like to send you our full, 10-lesson course,[**"The Federalist Papers,"**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-ZwTVCoz5GpbBFTXJLG9NEargg3KoQ_fRRZ9ZlyJoRMoBHKgMKzmFYkB8J7iqD1jtQgLeMUx9p4v7LRIlXLqgg5-8RkUdkJCrinHaqYnmRKdDutn3JaTxB7KrFXDMSot0HRsyPL6DKjBZPXCxbF1wSroo0MwWPIrWFVpFjwdv8Z8kAuEFFM9rmb3D-8B-X8iiCwXxN_1J_VkUhb4AZ3IaND0qKTAe0-3EnKlFCt4BtO_PD796C0fquH54rqQiWjE3LKu7Yeo8WjDq69o7_EE14Z-uzRQzXUgle7Jj-_K3RdUpYFt0pi9TSfdkVEcoH10_2T5b7Qhq5t41dx8lLz88I0eCELGFCS3VZjHtgY7gUgfSrkji0wMOh2xIX0jmDa_xui4i__fE3g=&c=_lGv5pzCJL0SsnX91DRxOvNyeF7fIZvcj3YykX4892q1IkhLOxnsAA==&ch=J22tCncrQVP0u1W8IDnjbV17ntz1CrV256NGk5ctkpGWhswcWX7Yyg==) on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your first-edition copy today: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-federalist-papers-dvd.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-ZwTVCoz5GpbBFTXJLG9NEargg3KoQ_fRRZ9ZlyJoRMoBHKgMKzmFYkB8J7iqD1jtQgLeMUx9p4v7LRIlXLqgg5-8RkUdkJCrinHaqYnmRKdDutn3JaTxB7KrFXDMSot0HRsyPL6DKjBZPXCxbF1wSroo0MwWPIrWFVpFjwdv8Z8kAuEFFM9rmb3D-8B-X8iiCwXxN_1J_VkUhb4AZ3IaND0qKTAe0-3EnKlFCt4BtO_PD796C0fquH54rqQiWjE3LKu7Yeo8WjDq69o7_EE14Z-uzRQzXUgle7Jj-_K3RdUpYFt0pi9TSfdkVEcoH10_2T5b7Qhq5t41dx8lLz88I0eCELGFCS3VZjHtgY7gUgfSrkji0wMOh2xIX0jmDa_xui4i__fE3g=&c=_lGv5pzCJL0SsnX91DRxOvNyeF7fIZvcj3YykX4892q1IkhLOxnsAA==&ch=J22tCncrQVP0u1W8IDnjbV17ntz1CrV256NGk5ctkpGWhswcWX7Yyg==) Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth-Defending Liberty since 1844

Peter,
**Sky-high prescription drug costs are burning a hole in the pockets of everyday Americans.**
Big Pharma is lining their pockets by jacking up the prices of prescription drugs. If they are not stopped, America will turn into a country where only the rich can afford to stay healthy. **We must fight back.**
[_**Sign this petition immediately to demand that Congress pass H.R. 3.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11814115/120789984/-277068481?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjIwMzUxMi0yMjA2LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AcGTJJEKl5vdEmRfR0HBSpF1B7WTUg3tjemqSN6xILw=&emci=8e05ba9c-7c05-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=0f203512-2206-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=8311474)
**We have an opportunity to put an end to sky-high prescription drug prices by demanding that Congress pass H.R. 3.** This bill addresses high prescription drug costs by allowing Medicare to directly negotiate with drug companies and make the results publicly available to all Americans. It also invests in innovation and creates a limit on out-of-pocket costs.
As your Congresswoman in 2020, I will protect Texans from pharmaceutical companies that want to squeeze us for every last cent. Together, we can end corporate greed and unfair prices for the drugs we need.
[_**Sign here to tell Congress we will not allow pharmaceutical companies to take advantage of us any longer.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11814116/120789986/-277068481?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjIwMzUxMi0yMjA2LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AcGTJJEKl5vdEmRfR0HBSpF1B7WTUg3tjemqSN6xILw=&emci=8e05ba9c-7c05-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=0f203512-2206-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=8311474)

Elisa Cardnell

name: Berrett Gall
subject: We can’t look vulnerable
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
| Hi there, In less than two months, we'll officially close the books on 2019 and our fundraising totals from the past year will be made public for the first time. Our Republican opponents will be scouring our records the moment they're available to get a sense of our strength heading into 2020. We can't afford to show any signs of weakness. The Trump campaign and their right-wing allies already plan to spend unprecedented sums of money in Minnesota next year to try to flip us red. If we look vulnerable at all, we'll embolden them even more. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/e5KoOcVKaH0PPWhr-ZOsfcZxFb6b299BcRojw7ijQxY=/3hMbVo5Flt7LmsHsngytUETUpsbTrHNUWOcFMfKRpIw=?refcode=header&amount=25)
---
Hi there,
In less than two months, we'll officially close the books on 2019 and our fundraising totals from the past year will be made public for the first time.
**Our Republican opponents will be scouring our records the moment they 're available to get a sense of our strength heading into 2020.** We can't afford to show any signs of weakness. The Trump campaign and their right-wing allies already plan to spend unprecedented sums of money in Minnesota next year to try to flip us red. If we look vulnerable at all, we'll embolden them even more.
Instead, let's prove what we've always known: Our One Minnesota message that recognizes our strength in unity will ALWAYS be stronger than negativity, fear, and division.
**Our Q4 mid-quarter deadline is this Friday, November 15. We need to raise $15,000 by then to stay on track to finish the year strong.** We still have $5,722 to go and I'm asking for your help today:

Peter, One week from today, Texas will execute Rodney Reed — unless we stop it.

Rodney Reed, a Black man from Bastrop County, Texas, was convicted of the 1996 rape and murder of Stacey Stites, a white woman, but another man likely committed the crime. After Reed was locked up, witnesses came forward to say that Reed and Stites were in a secret romantic relationship. Stites’ fiancé, Jimmy Fennell, had both motive and opportunity, and was later jailed for other sex assault crimes. But because of a flawed trial—untested DNA evidence, key witnesses never interviewed, and a lead investigator who was friends with Fennell—justice has never been served.

This weekend, I was joined by thousands of people who demanded that justice be served for Rodney. We were joined by national and local figures, death row exonerees, and every day folks who will not stand for this miscarraige of justice.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11817523/120819151/-2088956367?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDU2YzMzNy0yZTA2LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OD0EFrFE2J6Vbi8rEyGNWHy9No4SuQqxnPU6T8VdN_k=&emci=2f56c337-2e06-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=3056c337-2e06-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6233172)
Rodney Reed’s case is a throwback to Jim Crow Texas. Stites and Reed kept their relationship secret because they were in rural Bastrop and interracial relationships were forbidden. Reed was convicted by an all-white jury, after the prosecutor suppressed key evidence and painted a racist caricature of Reed as a violent man.

We cannot allow this Jim Crow injustice to continue. I am doing everything I can to stop the execution of Rodney Reed. I need you to join me and get involved: [Sign The Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11817524/120819152/-1485523847?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDU2YzMzNy0yZTA2LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OD0EFrFE2J6Vbi8rEyGNWHy9No4SuQqxnPU6T8VdN_k=&emci=2f56c337-2e06-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=3056c337-2e06-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6233172) [Call Governor Abbott](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11817525/120819153/-1485523847?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDU2YzMzNy0yZTA2LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OD0EFrFE2J6Vbi8rEyGNWHy9No4SuQqxnPU6T8VdN_k=&emci=2f56c337-2e06-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=3056c337-2e06-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6233172)
Rodney Reed needs our voice. Bastrop County is right here in the Texas 10th. Help us show the world that a different Texas is possible, and let’s do everything we can to save this man’s life. For justice,

name: J.D. Scholten
subject: PHOTO: Steve King stands with Jeff Session
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Hey Peter --

In case you missed it last week: former Attorney General Jeff Sessions is running for his old seat in the Senate.

We can’t afford to have him back in Congress. Jeff Sessions and Steve King are two peas in a pod. Steve King defended Sessions’s atrocious record as Attorney General, even after most Republicans were asking for his resignation.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11823867/120869559/-866490873?refcode=em19_191115_scholtenjones&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGEwMGU4Ny00MTA2LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zPvly9GG179KW1hnX91222TeujfKrl3Uw3hyAV59Jdw=)
We need to make sure that a fellow fighter for the everyday farmer, Senator Doug Jones, is re-elected next year.

**[Will you help me defeat Steve King and help Doug Jones defeat Jeff Sessions by making a donation of $5 or more to both of our campaigns right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11823868/120869560/-866490873?refcode=em19_191115_scholtenjones&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGEwMGU4Ny00MTA2LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zPvly9GG179KW1hnX91222TeujfKrl3Uw3hyAV59Jdw=)**
[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11823869/120869561/-866490873?refcode=em19_191115_scholtenjones&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGEwMGU4Ny00MTA2LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zPvly9GG179KW1hnX91222TeujfKrl3Uw3hyAV59Jdw=)
I have long admired Doug’s service for the people: fighting for justice and righting long-standing wrongs. He works tirelessly in the Senate to protect Americans’ healthcare and ensure our farmers are not subjected to unfair, harmful trade deals.

Meanwhile, when Jeff Sessions served in the Senate, he rolled back civil rights protections, denied the science behind climate change, voted against the Affordable Care Act, and opposed common sense criminal justice reforms. Not to mention his terrible track record as Attorney General -- becoming Trump’s yes man and championing the separation of children at the border.

We need leaders who will fight for working Americans -- people like Doug Jones. What we don't need are extreme politicians like Jeff Sessions and Steve King who advocate for taking rights away, vote to rip away health care for millions of Americans, and spew out hateful rhetoric.

I know where I stand in this election -- where do you?

**[If you want to help me defeat Steve King and make sure Jeff Sessions goes down in Alabama, then please donate $5 or more to both of our campaigns today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11823870/120869562/-866490873?refcode=em19_191115_scholtenjones&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGEwMGU4Ny00MTA2LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zPvly9GG179KW1hnX91222TeujfKrl3Uw3hyAV59Jdw=)**

Standing Tall for All,

\--J.D. Scholten

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11823871/120869563/-866490873?refcode=em19_191115_scholtenjones&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGEwMGU4Ny00MTA2LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zPvly9GG179KW1hnX91222TeujfKrl3Uw3hyAV59Jdw=)

name: Action via Thompson HQ
subject: service & sacrifice
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
Peter -- Did you see this call to action from Mike? He's working to ensure that the men and women who served our country are properly honored.

[Will you add your name to stand with him?](https://act.myngp.com/el/CUqeW7MkS_Oj8zlZetge3zDZ0JI6z9fUCel50f_mXKA=/cbTBT2DeWhjfQQg8yHmckb0wpndZ5EljEtcrqaOfydo=)

**Begin Forwarded Message:**

Peter,

As a Vietnam combat veteran and co-chair of the House Military Veterans caucus, I take our collective responsibility to support our men and women in uniform very seriously.

That's why I've introduced a bipartisan bill to repair the Mare Island Cemetery and transfer its ownership to the Department of Veterans Affairs. It's the government's responsibility to provide upkeep of this cemetery and ensure that it is preserved for generations to come.

[I need you to stand with me in calling for action. Tell Congress to pass this bill and properly honor the sacrifice of our nation's veterans ->](https://act.myngp.com/el/CUqeW7MkS_Oj8zlZetge3zDZ0JI6z9fUCel50f_mXKA=/cbTBT2DeWhjfQQg8yHmckb0wpndZ5EljEtcrqaOfydo=)

**[SIGN ON](https://act.myngp.com/el/CUqeW7MkS_Oj8zlZetge3zDZ0JI6z9fUCel50f_mXKA=/cbTBT2DeWhjfQQg8yHmckb0wpndZ5EljEtcrqaOfydo=)**
The more than 800 veterans interred at Mare Island dedicated their lives to serving our country. Ensuring that this important landmark is properly maintained is essential to respecting their service.

[Will you add your name to join me in properly honoring the legacy and service of our veterans? ->](https://act.myngp.com/el/CUqeW7MkS_Oj8zlZetge3zDZ0JI6z9fUCel50f_mXKA=/cbTBT2DeWhjfQQg8yHmckb0wpndZ5EljEtcrqaOfydo=)

Thanks for standing with me.

Mike

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/CUqeW7MkS_Oj8zlZetge3zDZ0JI6z9fUCel50f_mXKA=/cbTBT2DeWhjfQQg8yHmckb0wpndZ5EljEtcrqaOfydo=)
* * *
_Mike Thompson is a veteran and a longtime public servant. He represents California 's 5th district in Congress, where he fights for our healthcare and a clean environment every day. He cannot continue to do his crucial work without the support of people like you. [**Consider making a donation of any amount now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/CUqeW7MkS_Oj8zlZetge3zDZ0JI6z9fUCel50f_mXKA=/fw1ZNe8K8kKm53r80NNCFhttO1cIkdoDeXJGBk87brs=?amount=25&recurring=true&refcode=MT_EM_PT_90DO_191113_1_2&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D)_

| | Hi Peter, Today is the day. The day Democrats have been meticulously planning for. The day Republicans simultaneously demanded and decried. Today is the day the impeachment inquiry is opened to the public. name: Michael Bennet
subject: how do you like your eggs?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Friend,

I love grabbing breakfast on the campaign trail.

Often, my mornings are spent in local diners with my team reviewing what's ahead for the day: where I'm going, who I'm meeting, and what needs to get done.

It's also an opportunity to talk through the issues that are on people's minds.

[So, I'm really looking forward to having breakfast with a team member like you, friend.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae3c/134673f2/98a1198/6997dab2/981119092/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/breakfastwithbennet?refcode=EM_FR_B1_111319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[Chip in any amount - even a dollar - and you'll be automatically entered to join me on the campaign trail for breakfast.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae3c/134673f2/98a1198/6997dab2/981119092/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/breakfastwithbennet?refcode=EM_FR_B1_111319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae3c/134673f2/98a1198/6997dab2/981119092/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/breakfastwithbennet?refcode=EM_FR_B1_111319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
This will be a chance to chat about issues on your mind - and to get your perspective on where our country is headed as we gear up for the 2020 presidential election.

[I know candidates shouldn't make promises they can't keep - but I promise the coffee (or tea) will be hot, and the eggs will be done just the way you like them!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae3c/134673f2/98a1198/6997dab2/981119092/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/breakfastwithbennet?refcode=EM_FR_B1_111319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

I'm really looking forward to catching up over breakfast.

Best,

Michael
---

name: Cory Booker
subject: This is not about politics, this is about patriotism.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, Here's how we got to where we are in the impeachment inquiry of President Trump: **FIRST:** On September 24th, Speaker Nancy Pelosi announced her plans to launch a formal impeachment inquiry of President Trump, saying, _" The president must be held accountable."_ **THEN:** Over a dozen key witnesses testified to impeachment investigators behind closed doors. And House Democrats found that the evidence warranted the continuation of the inquiry. **NOW:** This morning, the House Intelligence Committee is holding the first public hearing of the inquiry, an important next step in taking the case against Donald Trump to the American public. **I support House Democrats ' efforts to give the American people the opportunity to evaluate witnesses in the impeachment inquiry for themselves, not through the lens of party leaders on either side of the aisle. [If you agree, click here to add your name next to mine.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/november-impeachment-signon?source=em_pet_20191113_CB_20191113-pet-CB-impeachment-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** We need a process that is honorable, gets to the facts, and seeks to bring our country together. And that is exactly what House Intelligence Committee Chairman Adam Schiff and House Democrats are doing by inviting the American people to learn the facts directly from witnesses. They are running these proceedings in a way that puts partisan politics aside and sets up a process that builds consensus by ensuring _the American people_ see all of the evidence against Donald Trump. Because the people deserve to know the truth -- that's why a transparent impeachment inquiry is not only critical, it's part of our moral obligation as Americans. **[If you support House Democrats for protecting the integrity of the impeachment inquiry by opening up the hearings to the American people, add your name next to mine here.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/november-impeachment-signon?source=em_pet_20191113_CB_20191113-pet-CB-impeachment-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Together,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/november-impeachment-signon?source=em_pet_20191113_CB_20191113-pet-CB-impeachment-actives_actives_button&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a8e/5fca0d19/79a13e5c/291c6353/3676943698/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a8e/5fca0d19/79a13e5c/291c6352/3676943698/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a8e/5fca0d19/79a13e5c/291c6351/3676943698/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a8e/5fca0d19/79a13e5c/291c6350/3676943698/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a8e/5fca0d19/79a13e5c/291c635f/3676943698/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a8e/5fca0d19/79a13e5c/291c6353/3676943698/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: staff@maggiehassan.com
subject: huge GOP meeting (Lewandowski, Trump, McConnell)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there --
With everyone from FiveThirtyEight to Roll Call saying that losing in New Hampshire would mean handing Republicans Senate control for another two years (and jeopardize the future of the Supreme Court!), it is so incredibly important that we protect Jeanne Shaheen.
The scary thing is that last week Corey Lewandowski met with Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump to plot their campaign to buy this seat and preserve Republicans' grip on the U.S. Senate.
There's no doubt about it: **GOP insiders are falling in line behind Lewandowski -- Trump's former campaign manager -- to try and take out Jeanne.**
Jeanne's relying on your help to fight back, everyone, and we need to raise $5,000 before midnight to help her fight back. clean_body: Hi there -- With everyone from FiveThirtyEight to Roll Call saying that losing in New Hampshire would mean handing Republicans Senate control for another two years (and jeopardize the future of the Supreme Court!), it is so incredibly important that we protect Jeanne Shaheen. The scary thing is that last week Corey Lewandowski met with Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump to plot their campaign to buy this seat and preserve Republicans' grip on the U.S. Senate. There's no doubt about it: GOP insiders are falling in line behind Lewandowski -- Trump's former campaign manager -- to try and take out Jeanne. Jeanne's relying on your help to fight back, everyone, and we need to raise $5,000 before midnight to help her fight back. "" If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Jeanne Shaheen and Maggie Hassan. "" "" "" "" There is just too much on the line to fall short here, so thank you so much for helping out. -- Maggie's campaign staff "" _

name: Yang2020.com
subject: In 82 days, the first votes will be cast. We need all hands on deck.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
We need you to pitch in so we can keep our ad on the air and reach more voters.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=3072%2E377263%2EBXuV0C) Yang Gang --

Great news! We just found out that we hit our second qualifying poll for the December debate.

**But we still need to hit two more in order to make it to the debate stage.**

In just 82 days, the first voters in the nation will cast their votes for the Democratic nominee for president.

**Fact:** 29% of Iowans are undecided.

**Problem:** Most Iowans don’t know who Andrew Yang is, let alone know what he stands for.

**Solution:** Put more money behind our TV ad -- _A New Way Forward_ \-- and reach more voters in the early states. 👇 _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16687?t=5&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=3072%2E377263%2EBXuV0C)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16687?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=3072%2E377263%2EBXuV0C)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16687?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=3072%2E377263%2EBXuV0C)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16687?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=3072%2E377263%2EBXuV0C)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16687?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=3072%2E377263%2EBXuV0C)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16687?t=8&amount=25&akid=3072%2E377263%2EBXuV0C)
---
If we hit our goal of $1 million by midnight tonight, we’ll be able to reach more voters in the critical time before they cast their votes.

**But we’re still $241,786 short of the goal.**

You’ve helped us reach every goal we’ve set so far, and we can’t reach this one without you.
[Pitch In](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16687?t=7&akid=3072%2E377263%2EBXuV0C)
---
Thanks for everything you do for our campaign!

Yang2020
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16687?t=6&akid=3072%2E377263%2EBXuV0C)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=3072%2E377263%2EBXuV0C) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=3072%2E377263%2EBXuV0C) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/XSamn-wwz4xPGekp-h8BN2vgB2aDn0aXQCljNHipzX4=/TB5zR8OF9UMdONUWJzm4aKVyXptqG4JPRZcCd3YsxJw=)

Dear Supporter,
Facts matter.

Today, we are witnessing history as only the 4th ever Presidential Impeachment hearings begin in the US House of Representatives. The facts of the case are not at issue. They are clear and indisputable. Yet, in order to protect power and not to protect you, the People, Republicans will lie and have lied at length.

Facts matter...
Your elected officials are charged with providing for your safety and security. Their campaigns are when they audition for your trust in doing so. In this North Carolina Senate campaign, facts don't seem to matter to either of my opponents as they characterize their campaigns as being funded only low dollar grassroots donations. To that, I say...

Facts matter.

My campaign and my public service reflects devotion and dedication to the truth and to the power of the people. I am unbought and unbossed, and despite my primary opponent spending $50,000 in a digital ad campaign with his money from New York Billionaires, I am still beating him head to head. To that I say...

Facts matter.

The truth of the matter is that YOU are fueling hope for this campaign. You are helping to defeat millions of dollars in out of state money. You have beat back these millions with your steadfast devotion to your state. Your voice won't be bought. Your voice is not for sale.
Your support of my One of Us for All of Us campaign gives HOPE to progressive candidates around the nation who seek to restore the voice of the people to the US Senate and to supplant the undue influence of money. My opponents would say otherwise, but to them, facts DO NOT matter. WE will hold them accountable. Anything you can give to support this grassroots campaign sends the message that you too are unbought and unbossed and you and you alone will choose your next North Carolina Senator!
Facts matter.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/XSamn-wwz4xPGekp-h8BN2vgB2aDn0aXQCljNHipzX4=/TB5zR8OF9UMdONUWJzm4aKVyXptqG4JPRZcCd3YsxJw=)

{{Authorized and Paid for by Erica for US .}}
{{Erica For US P.O. Box 1236 Gaston, North Carolina 27832}}
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/XSamn-wwz4xPGekp-h8BN2vgB2aDn0aXQCljNHipzX4=/1GqpfCbfetLM3fKdIxkFpCuythsDxpACW6mkOfMpAwg=).

Our numbers are coming up a little short of where they need to be right now, and we need to get back on track to hitting our November fundraising goal by the time Elizabeth takes the stage at the Democratic primary debate next week.

**In order to do that, though, we need a strong response from this grassroots community today. Specifically, we need 139 people from Pennsylvania to make their first donation today.**

She's ready to root out corruption in Washington, cancel student loan debt for 95% of Americans who carry it, tackle the climate crisis head on, and much more.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janet=20Barresi?=
subject: Enough of this witch hunt!
body:
Kendra Horn and other liberal Democrats must stop this impeachment show-trial | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/23457b505838/calling-all-patriots-12042793?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=6a4bf3f9ac&e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=24824c8cd3&e=795c6d9796)
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=ce547a3938&e=795c6d9796 "DONATE NOW")
---
| Peter, This impeachment witch hunt has gone on long enough.

The Democrats have no principled objection to the president. They have wanted him out of office since before he was sworn in.

This latest phase in their efforts to overturn the results of an election is no exception. The secretive and lawless inquiry Schiff and Pelosi are conducting makes a mockery of due process in our country.

Kendra Horn is a significant part of why this is happening to begin with. So-called "moderate" Democrats gave Nancy Pelosi the go-ahead to initiate this impeachment effort. In fact, it is the opposition to impeachment that is bipartisan, since a few Democrats joined the Republicans in voting to oppose this sham.

Oklahomans support our president, and Horn is trying to oust him from office. [**We have to win back this district in 2020 in order to put an end to the obstructionist Democrats' rule over the House.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=56c2b5c1d2&e=795c6d9796)

President Trump cannot deliver his agenda for the middle class without a conservative House. This district is key to taking back control of the House.
---
| [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=0d9e9c3ec3&e=795c6d9796)
---
| AP has called Oklahoma's 5th district "a seat both parties expect to work fiercely to win in 2020" and the Washington Post has rated this the number two race in the country. National Journal has gone one step further and says this is the nation's number one battleground district, and Decision Desk HQ has said "OK-5 is guaranteed to be one of 2020's most bitterly fought House elections."

Oklahoma's 5th district is going to be ground zero for the fight to take back the House in 2020. [**That's why we need your help.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=b44ab989a5&e=795c6d9796)

[**Will you contribute $25, $50, $100, $250, or even $500 to help us take back the House for conservatives and give the president the support he needs in Congress?**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=2b78a76b73&e=795c6d9796)

Simply put, this battle is about the swamp's efforts to overturn the will of We The People. We can't let that happen. Please join me in this battle

[**Please give $5, $15, $25, $50, $100, or anything you can to preserve your freedoms, your future and the future of your children. Any amount will make a big difference. Let’s stand up and fight!**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=57b5496e0e&e=795c6d9796)

Best,
[](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=857632a7d1&e=795c6d9796) \--Janet Barresi
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=e1cc1f8094&e=795c6d9796 "DONATE NOW")
---
| |
---

Janet for CongressPO Box 20147Oklahoma City, OK 73156-0147

name: Tim
subject: I am supporting Joe Biden, and I hope you will too.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
Friend,

Thank you for supporting me during my run for President. While I may no longer be running, **today I 'm proud to announce that I am endorsing Joe Biden for President of the United States.**

Since Donald Trump took office, he has manufactured trade wars that put profit over people and hurt farmers, workers, and small businesses. America can't afford a president who jeopardizes the success and dignity of its workers to make himself feel tough. America needs a leader who will put working communities and the middle class first. America needs Joe Biden.

Friend, I invite you to join me. [**Sign your name below to support Joe Biden:**](https://secure.timryanforamerica.%3D/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/join-the-team-tr?source=source=email-ls-20191113trjoin-b1_PET_tr_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ls&utm_campaign=20191113trjoin&utm_content=b1_PET_tr_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

He will not only be a voice for workers and the middle class, but I know he will get things done for Ohioans and the American people. From raising the minimum wage to $15 an hour to protecting and building on Obamacare to investing in infrastructure, Joe will rebuild the middle class.

Ohio is key to the presidency, and Joe is the only candidate who can win over the heartland and defeat Donald Trump. But he can't win without all of our support.

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Re: Sen. Cornyn on impeachment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Sen. Cornyn has abandoned his oath of office

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890806/7f51f7bc/4bdda40f/4ef0baaa/2859789420/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,
> _I do solemnly swear that
> **I will support and defend the Constitution of the United States**
> against all enemies, foreign and domestic;
> that I will bear true faith and allegiance to the same._
Those are the first words of the oath I took as a member of the United States Air Force. They're the same words that begin the oath that John Cornyn took when he became Senator nearly two decades ago.

As the impeachment hearings begin today, I am thinking about that oath and what it means. Sen. Cornyn has the constitutional duty to put our country over political party, and that means following the facts and giving a fair hearing to the allegations that the president abused his power for political gain.

As a combat veteran, it is unconscionable to me that a senator would flat-out reject the oath he took, and yet Sen. Cornyn "vows not to pay attention to impeachment." Here's what he said to _The Washington Post:_
> _" 'I'm just not going to -- I do not approve,' said Cornyn, who would serve as a juror in a Senate trial. Asked if that meant he was not going to watch the daily developments, he said, 'No, I am not, or by an hourly basis, or minute by minute.'"_
**[Sen. Cornyn has abandoned his oath of office. Will you pitch in to help me defeat him next November?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890806/7f51f7bc/4bdda40f/4ef0baa9/2859789420/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ5OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-oath?refcode=email_20191113.1nd__499__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

To make his conduct even worse, Sen. Cornyn is using the Congress upholding its constitutional duty to deflect from his total lack of legislative accomplishments for Texans. **He went so far as to shift the blame to the American people.** Take a look: | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890806/7f51f7bc/4bdda40f/4ef0baa9/2859789420/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ5OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-oath?refcode=email_20191113.1nd__499__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
**[Donate to help defeat Sen. Cornyn>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890806/7f51f7bc/4bdda40f/4ef0baa9/2859789420/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ5OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-oath?refcode=email_20191113.1nd__499__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
Sen. Cornyn has worked his tail off to bury legislation on critical issues -- like universal background checks, lower prescription drug prices, and improved election security -- in Mitch McConnell's legislative graveyard. He can't use impeachment to hide his record of putting his D.C. bosses and the special interests over Texans _every single time_.

**I took an oath to protect our Constitution when I served in our military. So did John Cornyn when he became Senator. His conduct is unbefitting of this oath.**

Sen. Cornyn has forgotten about the people and the Constitution he serves. It's time we vote him out. **Will you pitch in to help me defeat him?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890806/7f51f7bc/4bdda40f/4ef0baa8/2859789420/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ5OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-oath?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191113.1nd__499__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890806/7f51f7bc/4bdda40f/4ef0baaf/2859789420/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ5OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-oath?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191113.1nd__499__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890806/7f51f7bc/4bdda40f/4ef0baae/2859789420/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ5OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-oath?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191113.1nd__499__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890806/7f51f7bc/4bdda40f/4ef0baad/2859789420/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ5OSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-oath?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191113.1nd__499__&amount=50")**

MJ Hegar

name: Team Hick
subject: re: Impeachment hearings
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
No one, not even the president, is above the law, and we deserve to know all of the facts--that's what this process should be about. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771476/691c9bd/6f88ba4d/11a7f692/4188050007/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_template")
---
| The first public impeachment hearings in the House just began. Team, this is a big moment for our country--one that demands that our elected officials set partisanship aside to get to the truth.

However, since this impeachment investigation began, Senator Cory Gardner has lined up right behind the president to stonewall on even the most basic questions about what's right and wrong.

Enough is enough. Colorado deserves a senator who will put the interests of the country first--that's why John is running. Because we have to end the stranglehold that Mitch McConnell, and the reliable yes-men who enable him, have had on our democracy.

**That fight starts right here in Colorado.** [**_Will you chip in whatever you can right now to help send John to Washington?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191113_TH_20191113-fr-TH-impeachment-2mo_ndnr_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

No one, not even the president, is above the law, and we deserve to know all of the facts. That's what this investigation should be about.

But at every turn, Senator Gardner has treated this process as a way to show his loyalty to the president. In return, Donald Trump hasn't been shy about funneling funding to his campaign to help him hang onto this seat.

Look, no matter what happens in the days ahead, it's never been more clear that Gardner and some of his Republican colleagues are failing to live up to this moment--and to the oath that they took.

**Moments like these are exactly why we need leaders who will take their constitutional duty seriously. We deserve real leadership from our elected officials in Washington.** [**_Chip in whatever you can right now, and help send John to the Senate:_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191113_TH_20191113-fr-TH-impeachment-2mo_ndnr_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=") _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through right away._ [**_DONATE $5 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_20191113_TH_20191113-fr-TH-impeachment-2mo_2mo_expresslane5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

clean_body: No one, not even the president, is above the law, and we deserve to know all of the facts--that's what this process should be about. | | | "" | The first public impeachment hearings in the House just began. Team, this is a big moment for our country--one that demands that our elected officials set partisanship aside to get to the truth. However, since this impeachment investigation began, Senator Cory Gardner has lined up right behind the president to stonewall on even the most basic questions about what's right and wrong. Enough is enough. Colorado deserves a senator who will put the interests of the country first--that's why John is running. Because we have to end the stranglehold that Mitch McConnell, and the reliable yes-men who enable him, have had on our democracy. That fight starts right here in Colorado. "=" No one, not even the president, is above the law, and we deserve to know all of the facts. That's what this investigation should be about. But at every turn, Senator Gardner has treated this process as a way to show his loyalty to the president. In return, Donald Trump hasn't been shy about funneling funding to his campaign to help him hang onto this seat. Look, no matter what happens in the days ahead, it's never been more clear that Gardner and some of his Republican colleagues are failing to live up to this moment--and to the oath that they took. Moments like these are exactly why we need leaders who will take their constitutional duty seriously. We deserve real leadership from our elected officials in Washington. ---|---
|
## Wow- thank you!
---
|
---
|
---
---
| | Thank you from the bottom of my heart to everyone who has supported me throughout my time on Dancing with the Stars. A year ago if you had told me that I would be on this show, let alone make it to the quarterfinals, I would have told you that you were crazy.

At the beginning of the competition, I thought I had a chance to make it a week or two, but I made it all the way to week 9 because of your support and I’m so grateful. I was humbled every week by the results. It means so much to me that you took time out of your Monday nights to vote and be a part of this experience with me.

I also want to express my gratitude to the whole cast and crew of Dancing with the Stars 2019 - they are some of the most talented, professional, kind, creative, supportive and gracious people I’ve had the pleasure of working along side.

A special thanks to Lindsay Arnold who has been amazingly patient and beyond being an incredible dancer, is one of the most gifted instructors I have ever worked with. I was blessed to have her as my partner and am honored to call her a friend. A special thank you to Jenna Johnson, Lindsay’s good friend, who was able to fill in for the past two weeks and make sure the transition was seamless. I thought I struck gold with Lindsay as my partner, but lightning struck twice when I had the privilege of working with Jenna too. All of the people involved in the show have been amazing and that's what I will really miss most about being on the show.

I’m headed home to Virginia for a couple days (and luckily be home to celebrate my 15th wedding anniversary) before returning to LA for the finale.

Spicer Arnold 2019 hats, t-shirt, mugs, stickers, buttons, and yard signs are still available on [SpicerArnold.com](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=8bdec39714&e=f6564bbe3b) and all of the proceeds go to the Yellow Ribbon Fund and The Independence Fund.
---
| Thanks again,

_Sean_
---

| **Trump 's Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) just announced a new rule that will gut existing and future clean water and air regulations.**

[Listen, can you click here and instantly add your name to denounce the latest Trump attack in his unprecedented War on Science?](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb453e/4bd7760e/454c3a74/77ad5937/1337136822/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZQVGtWZlEweEpRMHRmVTBsSFRsVlFYMVZTVEZ0emJIVm5QWFJsYkd3dGRHaGxMV1Z3WVMxMGJ5MXNhWE4wWlc0dGRHOHRjMk5wWlc1alpWMGxKUT09IjoicGFnZS9vY3MvdGVsbC10aGUtZXBhLXRvLWxpc3Rlbi10by1zY2llbmNlL2dsNWdocSJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/ocs/tell-the-epa-to-listen-to-science/gl5ghq?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+FIRSTNAMEListen+can+you+click+here+and+i&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_191113_30OP_1_1&source=314_EM_PT_191113_30OP_1_1&refcode=314_EM_PT_191113_30OP_1_1") | | [Add your name »](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb453e/4bd7760e/454c3a74/77ad5936/1337136822/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZQVGtWZlEweEpRMHRmVTBsSFRsVlFYMVZTVEZ0emJIVm5QWFJsYkd3dGRHaGxMV1Z3WVMxMGJ5MXNhWE4wWlc0dGRHOHRjMk5wWlc1alpWMGxKUT09IjoicGFnZS9vY3MvdGVsbC10aGUtZXBhLXRvLWxpc3Rlbi10by1zY2llbmNlL2dsNWdocSJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/ocs/tell-the-epa-to-listen-to-science/gl5ghq?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+raquo&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_191113_30OP_1_1&source=314_EM_PT_191113_30OP_1_1&refcode=314_EM_PT_191113_30OP_1_1")

The latest round of regulation-busting from Trump's EPA is simply outrageous.

This move will undo the substantial progress on environmental protection that we've made since the EPA's creation in the late 70s.

Under this new rule, studies proving that lead in paint dust causes behavioral problems in children or that polluted air has led to premature deaths won't be factored in when clean air and water regulations are renewed.

**_This latest move has left the fossil fuel industry THRILLED. They 've wanted this enacted for a long time -- which is why we need your help to fight back._**

[Please click here and instantly add your name to fight back against the latest attack in Trump's War on Science.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb453e/4bd7760e/454c3a74/77ad5935/1337136822/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZQVGtWZlEweEpRMHRmVTBsSFRsVlFYMVZTVEZ0emJIVm5QWFJsYkd3dGRHaGxMV1Z3WVMxMGJ5MXNhWE4wWlc0dGRHOHRjMk5wWlc1alpWMGxKUT09IjoicGFnZS9vY3MvdGVsbC10aGUtZXBhLXRvLWxpc3Rlbi10by1zY2llbmNlL2dsNWdocSJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/ocs/tell-the-epa-to-listen-to-science/gl5ghq?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+Please+click+here+and+instantly+add+your&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_191113_30OP_1_1&source=314_EM_PT_191113_30OP_1_1&refcode=314_EM_PT_191113_30OP_1_1")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: How Democrat Leaders Made Today’s Hearings ‘As Scripted As Possible’
body:
"Democrats from Speaker Nancy Pelosi on down are open about their intentions here: The point now isn’t to examine the evidence so they can decide..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c00f911763&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **How Democrat Leaders Made Today’s Hearings ‘As Scripted As Possible’**

“Democrats from Speaker Nancy Pelosi on down are open about their intentions here: The point now isn’t to examine the evidence so they can decide whether to impeach President Trump, but simply to sway public opinion against him,” the _New York Post_ editorial board writes.

“Pelosi and Rep. Adam Schiff, the Intelligence Committee chairman, have tried to make the coming hearings as scripted as possible: They’re only calling witnesses who’ve already testified in secret, or in some cases just releasing transcripts of that testimony.”

The editors write that it’s clear House Democrats aren’t actually trying to reach across the aisle and persuade their colleagues in the Senate, as the Founders intended. “No, Democrats are using impeachment as a partisan stunt — perverting the Constitution’s process for purely political purposes. It’s a disgrace.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c5cdd3155b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Schiff and Pelosi are not interested in real demonstrations of innocence or guilt. Their only interest is staging a political coup against their adversaries. But this is even bigger than the president. This is an attempt to overthrow the federal government from the inside,” constitutional law attorney Jenna Ellis Rives writes in [_The Hill_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d2ae9a9476&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| Much like the hyped-up “whistleblower,” Rep. Schiff today is calling forward individuals to testify who admit they have no firsthand knowledge of President Trump’s telephone call with the President of Ukraine. “The Democratic chairman of the House Intelligence Committee says he doesn’t want Republicans turning the impeachment proceedings into a ‘sham.’ The hilarious irony is lost on no one,” Gregg Jarrett writes for [**Fox News**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d225c58e47&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “For those who find the hearings far from riveting but watch out of obligation or amusement, here’s a modest suggestion to pass the hours productively: Count the important things your representatives could and should be doing otherwise. They could seal the border and fix the immigration mess. They could get back to that huge infrastructure program that everybody in Washington said they wanted. Pelosi could pass the new NAFTA deal, with even the unions blasting Dems for doing nothing,” Michael Goodwin writes in the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f30df26264&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “It has become clearer than ever that our trading policies with Canada and Mexico need to be modernized — which is why Congress must take action and ratify the United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement (USMCA) promptly,” writes Darlene Robbins, leader of a Pennsylvania manufacturing association, in the [_Wilkes-Barre Times Leader_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b73b619a13&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=df9bb45225&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7c21d6ba91&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=84b2ba3c14)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Bill Bryant
subject: It's important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forge
body:
After nearly $100,000 in of FORGE WA investments into local races
in Pierce, Spokane and Snohomish, we have targeted elections that
are still counting ballots. FORGE has moved $10,000 to finance
teams that will ensure every vote is counted in these counties.

Friends,

I'm asking for your help one
last time for 2019. It's important.

After nearly $100,000 in of
FORGE WA investments into local races in Pierce, Spokane and
Snohomish, we have targeted elections that are still counting
ballots. FORGE has moved $10,000 to finance teams that will
ensure every vote is counted in these counties.

FORGE is paying for teams to go
door-to-door and help rehabilitate ballots that otherwise might
be thrown out because of a missing signature or another
technicality. The remaining races are so close this final push
could determine who wins and who loses.

The Democrat Party is doubling
down to make sure all their likely voters' ballots are counted.
Unfortunately, at this critical moment, FORGE'S resources are
running out.

It costs us nearly $1,000 a day
to run a full professional canvassing crew, and our road warriors
will make the difference in races like Cindy Wendle for Spokane
City Council President. After last night's count, Cindy is just
down 7 votes. We need all hands on deck now.

Not next week, but now. We
need funds now to keep these post-election teams working.

Can you help us with $25, $50,
$100 or $250?

With the socialist Democrats
taking over Seattle, we are going to need good leaders such as
Cindy Wendle and others like recent FORGE target Mayor-Elect
Brett Gailey in Lake Stevens to put balance back into our state.

Please invest in our victories
by making your donation today! Our candidates work too hard to
abandon them after Election Day, when elections can still be won
or lost.

Please help keep FORGE'S
post-election teams working.

It's Time,

Bill Bryant

DONATE

Paid for by Forge
Washington · PO Box 21449 · Seattle, WA 98111
Contributions are not
deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from
foreign nationals are prohibited.

This message was sent from Forge Washington and was intended for
dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to send this message to some of your
friends, you can click here to do so. You can also follow the
campaign on Facebook.

If you believe you received this
message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Forge
Washington, click here to unsubscribe.

body:
