| | I know you're getting a lot of emails. (And trust me, I don't love asking you for money.) But with just 12 hours between me and the final cutoff for the next debate, I have to ask one more time. **[_Can you rush in $5 within the hour to fund my final push, get my message out to voters, and keep my voice in this race? >>_](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191113_em_fr_b1_castro_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")** I've been counted out since the moment I entered this race. The establishment and the media wouldn't give me a shot. The president insulted my family. And yet we defied the odds -- every time. **That 's why I'm not ashamed to write this email today and admit I need your help. ** Frankly, your help is the only reason our movement has made it this far. So forgive me for asking, but I have to give this everything I've got: Can you chip in $5 before the deadline in 12 hours? _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc823/3eb3e2fc/56993c92/744d9924/2397688544/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSJ9/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20191113_em_fr_b1_castro_all")**

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

subject: A big announcement for our movement!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/pnf0pQklrYD1tm35gO0oYSpJpTwuGVnY9ueNttG4MuE=/xM-1q1A2Ce84aan5XJ7V6wb_twwkXC1GiT66zwGq-II=?refcode=20191113email_ecu&amount=22&recurring=auto)
---
Team, **I am so proud to announce our campaign 's newest national endorsement: End Citizens United, a group that focuses on campaign finance reform, has taken notice of the grassroots movement we've built and endorsed me in the race for TX-22!** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/pnf0pQklrYD1tm35gO0oYSpJpTwuGVnY9ueNttG4MuE=/xM-1q1A2Ce84aan5XJ7V6wb_twwkXC1GiT66zwGq-II=?refcode=20191113email_ecu&amount=22&recurring=auto) [**Ready to join ECU in flipping TX-22 BLUE and bringing reform to Washington?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/pnf0pQklrYD1tm35gO0oYSpJpTwuGVnY9ueNttG4MuE=/xM-1q1A2Ce84aan5XJ7V6wb_twwkXC1GiT66zwGq-II=?refcode=20191113email_ecu&amount=22&recurring=auto) | ******[DONATE $22 NOW](https://act.myngp.com/el/pnf0pQklrYD1tm35gO0oYSpJpTwuGVnY9ueNttG4MuE=/xM-1q1A2Ce84aan5XJ7V6wb_twwkXC1GiT66zwGq-II=?refcode=20191113email_ecu&amount=22&recurring=auto)******
---

I decided to resign from the foreign services and run for Congress because I saw how corrupt our political system has become. And one of the biggest causes of this dysfunction is corporate money's undue influence on our government.
It's why dismantling our rigged political system by enacting campaign finance reform is a priority of mine. And the first step is to get elected without support from dark money -- which is why I refuse to accept corporate PAC money.
**[Instead, I rely solely on grassroots supporters, like YOU and the rest of Team Sri, to fuel our campaign. name: 2020 Endorsement Alert
subject: BREAKING: Indiana State Police Alliance endorses Gov. Holcomb
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Governor Holcomb couldn’t be more honored to have the endorsement of the men and women who protect and serve Hoosiers every single day. | |
---
| |
---|---|---
Friend,

Have you heard the big news?

_The Indiana State Police Alliance just endorsed Governor Holcomb’s 2020 re-election bid._
[ ](facebook.com/587835028017559/posts/1622574911210227/)
[ **Share Their Endorsement on Facebook** ](facebook.com/587835028017559/posts/1622574911210227/)
Governor Holcomb couldn’t be more honored to have the endorsement of the men and women who protect and serve Hoosiers every single day.
_“Indiana’s thin blue line is made up of selfless women and men who drop everything and spring into action in service of someone else – no matter what danger stands in their way. Whenever duty calls, Indiana’s law enforcement officers answer and protect all of us. As Hoosiers, we proudly stand with them and I couldn’t be more honored to have their support.”- Governor Eric Holcomb_
The Indiana State Police Alliance -- which is comprised of 2,000 active and retired state troopers -- supports our law enforcement in ALL 92 counties. The Alliance fights for increased member benefits such as legal assistance, funeral support and survivor benefits, college scholarships and much more.

Support for Indiana’s law enforcement community has been a top priority for Governor Holcomb. He has worked tirelessly to serve the brave law enforcement officers who keep Hoosiers safe throughout the state.

**[Want to spread the good news? Share the Indiana State Police Alliance’s endorsement on Facebook.](facebook.com/587835028017559/posts/1622574911210227/)**
[ **Share Their Endorsement on Facebook** ](facebook.com/587835028017559/posts/1622574911210227/)
Regards,

Holcomb Crew
---
_Contributions by corporations and labor organizations are limited to $5,000 annually; contributions by individuals, LLCs and political committees are unlimited. Contributions are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited. You may also contribute by check made out to "Eric Holcomb For Indiana" and mailed to 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 2200, Indianapolis, IN 46204._
---
|
|
| |

name: Tracy Newman
subject: We're checking our records
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Is this right?
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7553?t=3&akid=7985%2E868730%2Efmap3_) Friend, Every year, we know that the "freeze" is coming -- but this year, it's harder than normal. Jay's running for re-election as Washington's governor, and the progress we make here is emulated in cities and states across the country. From climate change to health care, from equal pay to gun safety, what we do here matters -- and Republicans know it. But soon the legislative freeze will stop our fundraising in its tracks. While we can't raise a dime from December 14th through the Washington state legislative session -- _almost four months_ \-- our opponents will be able to rake in money hand over fist. Because with only three incumbent governors to target in 2020, you know unseating Jay would be a HUGE win for the Republican establishment. **Our deadline tomorrow is a real one: On Thursday, we'll have just one month left to raise any money until next spring, and we have a $25,000 goal to hit by midnight. We're checking our records to make sure we have every single donation counted -- will you confirm this?** **SUPPORTER RECORD FOR:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**PREVIOUS DONATION AMOUNT:** Not yet a donor
**DATE OF PREVIOUS DONATION:** Not yet a donor
**SUGGESTED ACTION:** [**Donate $1 or more right now.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7553?t=4&akid=7985%2E868730%2Efmap3_) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7554?t=5&akid=7985%2E868730%2Efmap3_)

---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7557?t=8&akid=7985%2E868730%2Efmap3_)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7558?t=9&akid=7985%2E868730%2Efmap3_)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7559?t=10&akid=7985%2E868730%2Efmap3_)
---
Every donation makes a real difference -- I hope you step up before tomorrow's deadline.
Thanks,
Tracy Newman
Senior Advisor
Inslee for Washington
P.S. If you've made a donation to Jay Inslee's campaign for governor that isn't reflected above, don't worry -- it may still be processing or in a different system. Thanks for your support.

Peter,

I’m sick of New York being ranked last in the country. Our sky-high taxes and terrible unemployment is driving people away from our state and our district.

Our state is so bad for businesses and jobs that we’re ranked 49th in the country for business climate. We’re also ranked 48th for individual taxes. This MUST stop!

That’s why I’m fighting for change. **Upstate New Yorkers work hard, but our government is failing us with their disastrous policies.** Governor Cuomo and radicals like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Anthony Brindisi are fighting to drive our state and our district right into the ground. I refuse to let that happen, but I need your support right away.

**We’re coming up on our critical Mid-Month deadline, and we need you to step up and fight for Upstate New York. **
[ **Rush in $20. >>>** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=05b621ec575f40dea761c75f37cbe0fe&_e=q-qi6TXYEK78uY1kW45z0rzrmUDJDi4U98fcktZslDuByqmocIQVHHLj0XNEKj9Z9-ZsMP97t_yx2pVeM7VPbcrMh51rA1cDSoTP9ORDmtrVkqIAAt05QNEY9R1KqZHfRgcxhof2VVdjNombinDFwY2nNB2zZRLPphlYNRPoeUAC-mLkQUnfI8qrcKKRZPQOkSXnNpvY0UMZwSeIFNOVTK6vPujR6cVhIYAHstUq6TXwx53MQj_9zWFf0l5XRWup-U1TrZKhihadWHqVLs2UKJ6Cc5NxVhs5ZXhBpHkoROBtkiIJDglx2usaRN9p4TS7IRyi23qk9KUQVM037S5o2PUo8K5j4RhtSPJoed-vNT1A_k9w1WHcipbTjkm_i2BzXGxUCS1jvdzY8OBj4-0YRKULqtZegVzHXGc-dW1CmzpYCvGQFFL3QU8ww1Cs9ykl)

name: Jason Yates
subject: A Call to Pray During Impeachment Inquiry
body:
Peter,
Public hearings began yesterday in the House of Representatives impeachment inquiry, focusing on the circumstances surrounding President Trump's July 25 phone call with Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky.
While it’s tempting to shove the hearings aside and chalk it all up to partisan politics, we need to be informed, engaged, and bring the solutions of our faith to the discussion table. Most importantly, we need to pray.
We’ve created a [simple guide to understand the impeachment process and to know how to pray](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iVwdJeCmofALo-DyifTU8cDzuoN2QeAynqtiqurwmh20BmQn1P0SAbChvtrwE-8HX-WWyG4ILC3vs_OkEmFZby0iMD-EkaTtk7OR0Wy7CnqZ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191114com01&n=1).
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iVwdJeCmofALo-DyifTU8cDzuoN2QeAynqtiqurwmh20BmQn1P0SAbChvtrwE-8HX-WWyG4ILC3vs_OkEmFZby0iMD-EkaTtk7OR0Wy7CnqZ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191114com01&n=2)
Specifically, we ask you to pray for each person on the House Intelligence Committee, the committee handling the impeachment inquiry. Pray for each member by name. Pray they would operate in good-faith bipartisanship, seeking only the truth, with the overarching desire to be fair, comprehensive, and full of integrity as they listen to each testimony given. Here are the committee members by name.
##### Republicans:
Devin Nunes, Ranking Member, CA-22
Mike Conaway, TX-11
Michael Turner, OH-10
Brad Wenstrup, OH-2
Chris Stewart, UT-2
Jim Jordan, OH-4*
Elise Stefanik, NY-21
Will Hurd, TX-23
John Ratcliffe, TX-4
##### Democrats:
Adam Schiff, Chairman, CA-28
Jim Himes, CT-4
Terri Sewell, AL-7
Andre Carson, IN-7
Jackie Speier, CA-14
Mike Quigley, IL-5
Eric Swalwell, CA-15
Joaquin Castro, TX-20
Denny Heck, WA-10
Peter Welch, Vermont-at-Large
Sean Patrick Maloney, NY-18
Val Demings, FL-10
Raja Krishnamoorthi, IL-8
We urge you to pray faithfully for our nation (2 Chronicles 7:14). When you do, you are joining with other Christians across the country in prayer. Together, our prayers are powerful.
Let us remain faithful to what God calls us to in Jeremiah 29:7 for the sake of our communities and our nation: “Seek the peace and prosperity of the city to which I have carried you into exile. Pray to the LORD for it, because if it prospers, you too will prosper.”
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191114com01&n=3)
*Temporarily replacing Rick Crawford, AR-1
©2019 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191114com01&n=4).

Republicans: Devin Nunes, Ranking Member, CA-22 Mike Conaway, TX-11 Michael Turner, OH-10 Brad Wenstrup, OH-2 Chris Stewart, UT-2 Jim Jordan, OH-4 Elise Stefanik, NY-21 Will Hurd, TX-23 John Ratcliffe, TX-4 Democrats: Adam Schiff, Chairman, CA-28 Jim Himes, CT-4 Terri Sewell, AL-7 Andre Carson, IN-7 Jackie Speier, CA-14 Mike Quigley, IL-5 Eric Swalwell, CA-15 Joaquin Castro, TX-20 Denny Heck, WA-10 Peter Welch, Vermont-at-Large Sean Patrick Maloney, NY-18 Val Demings, FL-10 Raja Krishnamoorthi, IL-8 We urge you to pray faithfully for our nation (2 Chronicles 7:14). When you do, you are joining with other Christians across the country in prayer. Together, our prayers are powerful. Let us remain faithful to what God calls us to in Jeremiah 29:7 for the sake of our communities and our nation: “Seek the peace and prosperity of the city to which I have carried you into exile. Pray to the LORD for it, because if it prospers, you too will prosper.” United. We Stand. Jason Yates CEO Temporarily replacing Rick Crawford, AR-1 ©2019 My Faith Votes 10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Tell Congress: Pass the Green New Deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hey Peter, Our planet is facing unprecedented climate and environmental change, and governments are doing next to nothing about it. In fact, the Trump administration is undoing environmental regulations and withdrawing the U.S. from the Paris climate agreement, setting this country back decades. We need Congress and the White House to take climate change seriously \-- we need them to stand up, be leaders, and take action to ensure a livable future for our kids and grandkids, not hide their heads in the sand and take money from corporations that are causing the problems. The Green New Deal is one concrete action that they can take, securing clean energy jobs, building community resilience, and reducing our harmful emissions. [**If you agree that Congress needs to pass the Green New Deal today, add your name to ours here. The future cannot be left up to chance, and climate change cannot be ignored any longer. name: Margaret Good
subject: About prescription drugs:
body:
No one should have to ration or skip their medicine because they can’t afford it. https://margaretgood.com [https://margaretgood.com]
Hey team,
I wanted to talk today about something that matters a great deal to me: making healthcare affordable and accessible, specifically by lowering the cost of prescription drugs.
This is one of the reasons I am running for Congress – because families shouldn’t have to choose between keeping a roof over their head or food on the table, and being able to pay for vital prescriptions.
If we want to make healthcare affordable and accessible, we cannot only focus on strengthening the Affordable Care Act, our government must take a stand and help manage prescription drug prices through regulation and negotiation.
Prescription prices are higher in the United States than anywhere else in the world for one reason, and one reason only: lawmakers are not acting. Pharmaceutical companies are not being held accountable for actions that impact real people’s lives.
No one should have to ration or skip their medicine because they can’t afford it. It’s time we elect leaders who fight for accessible and affordable healthcare, instead of caving to the demands of Big Pharma.
That’s why we, with your support, will be working harder than ever to flip FL-16 — because we need someone to stand up for the affordable healthcare our families deserve.
Thank you for being a part of this effort.
-- Margaret

| Team,

body:

| | I'm asking from the bottom of my heart: [**_I know we have a historic chance to unseat Mitch McConnell and take back the entire Senate. But we can 't do it without winning Ben Ray's race. I'm asking you to rush $5 before his critical deadline in 48 hours to elect Ben Ray, DEFEAT McConnell, and FLIP the Senate. >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191113_em_fr_b1_gillibrand_all_v1&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250") I've been in the Senate for a decade. The damage I've watched Mitch McConnell inflict in that time is unspeakable. \- I've watched him cover up Trump's ties to Russia \- I've witnessed his shameful assault on Medicare \- I've watched his relentless attacks on women's rights **And now, I 'd love nothing more than to watch him lose his seat -- and his majority -- for what he's done.** I know this is our once-in-a-lifetime chance to defeat McConnell. Even _Fox News_ admits his favorability is historically low. But I also know Democrats can't win the Senate without winning Ben Ray's race. I need a progressive champion like him serving alongside me in the Senate. He needs 2,078 gifts before his critical Mid-Month Deadline. Can I count on your $5? | | ******[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191113_em_fr_b1_gillibrand_all_v1&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")******

Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Friend,

The Democrats have reached a new low.

Adam Schiff is lying to the American People every single day and has yet to be held accountable.
* **He coordinated with the Whistleblower**
* **Lied about his involvement with the Whistleblower**
* **Misrepresented President Trump 's Ukraine Call**
* **Excluded President Trump 's lawyers from the inquiry**

If today's Fake Impeachment Hearings show one thing, it's that this whole sham is a continuation of the Democrat's political vendetta against President Trump that began the day he was elected.

The Left will never rest until they IMPEACH YOUR PRESIDENT. We know that will NEVER happen, and it's time to make a statement to Nancy and Adam Schiff to call it off for good.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: If the rich and powerful don't like it, then tough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
If we keep letting big money control our campaigns, the wealthy and well-connected will keep controlling Washington -- and our government will only work for people who can afford to hire armies o | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528844/45c30650/105cf31a6/66f41707/604848328/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
I'll just be blunt: I'm about to ask if you can make a donation to our campaign. But first, I want to explain why your support would have a powerful impact as we move into 2020.

Here's the way I see it: Our campaign is based on big ideas and a core principle -- everyone gets equal access because we're fighting for a government that works for everyone.

Our democracy is not for sale, and neither is my time.

So I've opted out of the unwritten rule of politics that says I'm supposed to run for office by sucking up to rich donors on Wall Street and powerful interests in Washington.

I'm not hosting swanky fundraisers where you can only get in if you write a ginormous check. I'm not taking PAC money, donations from federal lobbyists, or applications from billionaires who want to run a Super PAC on my behalf.

**If we keep letting big money control our campaigns, the wealthy and well-connected will keep controlling Washington -- and our government will only work for people who can afford to hire armies of lobbyists and lawyers.**

We're fighting to change all that. We're building a grassroots movement to put power in the hands of the people.

[**It's only possible with contributions from people like you. I'm deeply grateful that you're on our team. Will you make a donation right now to help make sure we hit our goal?**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528844/45c30650/105cf31a6/66f41709/604848328/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDU2Rl9FR1JfTkZGX0VfMjAxOTExMTNfVjFTMl9QX1QxIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML56F_EGR_NFF_E_20191113_V1S2_P_T1") | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

clean_body: If we keep letting big money control our campaigns, the wealthy and well-connected will keep controlling Washington -- and our government will only work for people who can afford to hire armies o | | | "" I'll just be blunt: I'm about to ask if you can make a donation to our campaign. But first, I want to explain why your support would have a powerful impact as we move into 2020. Here's the way I see it: Our campaign is based on big ideas and a core principle -- everyone gets equal access because we're fighting for a government that works for everyone. Our democracy is not for sale, and neither is my time. So I've opted out of the unwritten rule of politics that says I'm supposed to run for office by sucking up to rich donors on Wall Street and powerful interests in Washington. I'm not hosting swanky fundraisers where you can only get in if you write a ginormous check. I'm not taking PAC money, donations from federal lobbyists, or applications from billionaires who want to run a Super PAC on my behalf. If we keep letting big money control our campaigns, the wealthy and well-connected will keep controlling Washington -- and our government will only work for people who can afford to hire armies of lobbyists and lawyers. We're fighting to change all that. We're building a grassroots movement to put power in the hands of the people. "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" When we hit our fundraising goals -- dollar by dollar, quarter after quarter -- and keep building our movement -- face to face, person to person -- we show the rich and the powerful that it's time for big, structural change. Sooner than they think. Billionaires, CEOs, big banks, and giant corporations won't always run the show in Washington. I've got a plan -- a bunch of plans -- to level the playing field for working people and make sure we're building a future not just for some of our kids, but all of our kids. And if the rich and powerful don't like it, then tough. We've got to make big, structural change. We're going to. But it'll take a massive grassroots movement to get it done. _[Do you believe that a woman of color can be a conservative Republican without being "Brain-washed?"](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=e51ddbccac3e405aa846fa2e0e3f2722&_e=ypO2dyGxy0GsbXTxWuLnTJIhMrx6Z6d7Ts6swZgdNV0hTw_giR3iFdziHIamPai-Lyswuyt06u_vZA-LQ3mzjC0YG3s0ZMoCv0ZWxFWGG1xusd7ksD_a7u61fpMxZeGkatsXBpERi2GmDpbsxUeLV2RgYuWPeBrqP8gmX88naq_q3N7x55oZKuYs9Sva2jkeH3QoRZQSMQMkx1kbJyGgeqGGwwmC1qqBC0pXMreTdhrlxcHsPRq0jUQZ6Or-nrNpFcGMtTAvdIBVaLb2FsXKHHKvs5y0oJcQrUu1w1LvXu-GiRwScog1IaZzciDOC8TjSDBVOfsnnnmaVB5Ra9lLqJizeVq359-AwwUZ_dxT0rBXhlEN7eH5G5r8w-lEPEpjLLuFu42BdYF4mSkTmTv2djVwJV2pwVtLveZyU31d6y8%3D)_
**SUMMARY:** I've been smeared and slurred by liberals who proclaim their open-mindedness, tolerance, and desire for diversity. They say I must be brain-washed to be a _conservative_.

I need to hear from you because I think liberals are the ones who are brain-washed. Help me fight the liberal smears and set the record straight. [RESPOND →](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=e51ddbccac3e405aa846fa2e0e3f2722&_e=ypO2dyGxy0GsbXTxWuLnTJIhMrx6Z6d7Ts6swZgdNV0hTw_giR3iFdziHIamPai-Lyswuyt06u_vZA-LQ3mzjC0YG3s0ZMoCv0ZWxFWGG1xusd7ksD_a7u61fpMxZeGkatsXBpERi2GmDpbsxUeLV2RgYuWPeBrqP8gmX88naq_q3N7x55oZKuYs9Sva2jkeH3QoRZQSMQMkx1kbJyGgevBoT5_pAZXuzvbwlf4dBUbaAFEVQ70cy9uYul2n98rO9hMd0Ue48ngalYrvqicC1kVVhRZj7L54X-YH17RURM8rMttS22hBgQij713bc-LgIjxg0o3FJysKcvsmN409J4OfKOH3OQB6tAtiLepkOoXqxeMu6R2Wv_WYjixyHpUfsTQfDl1abuiWwSgektY7hLu4QUbhHJ3eOxPSKZMDrJg%3D)
---
[](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=e51ddbccac3e405aa846fa2e0e3f2722&_e=ypO2dyGxy0GsbXTxWuLnTJIhMrx6Z6d7Ts6swZgdNV0hTw_giR3iFdziHIamPai-Lyswuyt06u_vZA-LQ3mzjC0YG3s0ZMoCv0ZWxFWGG1xusd7ksD_a7u61fpMxZeGkatsXBpERi2GmDpbsxUeLV2RgYuWPeBrqP8gmX88naq_q3N7x55oZKuYs9Sva2jkeH3QoRZQSMQMkx1kbJyGgenhq7VStrFHVwMwt_mbIGD1YnAtLZfysAzQr_7BZfWXwVmm19ku-M9pw-yjKppNSw_6P7b7ndmpvdR4qKsivRvAIe7hZxh-f9ORxMKL8LB-1VNKE6FRb6fX-lxla6DB2aXKr3L9xuhD9ymW7RL9pB1mAHv1QIKYcNNylvgpgon79DzVe48XUby72nD_cJY7JpStY2wmLxc6vjW_CUtVPSik%3D)
Friend,

I’m reaching out to you today because **you’ve been identified as one of the most highly informed, active Republicans in the country** , and I want to get your input on how you think Republicans can win back the house next year.

Currently, there are seven times as many female Democrats serving in the U.S. House than there are Republicans. I believe our party has a reputation that can only be addressed by nominating more women to serve in office – but I want to know what you think.

[Would you spare less than one minute to answer a few questions for me today? Click this unique link to begin your digital survey](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=e51ddbccac3e405aa846fa2e0e3f2722&_e=ypO2dyGxy0GsbXTxWuLnTJIhMrx6Z6d7Ts6swZgdNV0hTw_giR3iFdziHIamPai-Lyswuyt06u_vZA-LQ3mzjC0YG3s0ZMoCv0ZWxFWGG1xusd7ksD_a7u61fpMxZeGkatsXBpERi2GmDpbsxUeLV2RgYuWPeBrqP8gmX88naq_q3N7x55oZKuYs9Sva2jkeH3QoRZQSMQMkx1kbJyGgehSZZGbS8hTYEvknWd786DTznaOGjn0LRqJMHsFLSKXgUFeMpvvzqkTinmqT9VpRhXoboo80uD-FmzG6iYyqwifyszwoqLPy5aaTwwZHVArspNxND4hkYUAX75DOPPH7Zb9--Ti4_KOHX7eypbclB3Yc83CUPe3eaGk_KgLRxSSn5BdmALTpzgKGT6Xq0eQQ3nuODG8aIUWWRsEoc1mHLEY%3D) 🔗
| [**Begin Survey Now »**](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=e51ddbccac3e405aa846fa2e0e3f2722&_e=ypO2dyGxy0GsbXTxWuLnTJIhMrx6Z6d7Ts6swZgdNV0hTw_giR3iFdziHIamPai-Lyswuyt06u_vZA-LQ3mzjC0YG3s0ZMoCv0ZWxFWGG1xusd7ksD_a7u61fpMxZeGkatsXBpERi2GmDpbsxUeLV2RgYuWPeBrqP8gmX88naq_q3N7x55oZKuYs9Sva2jkeH3QoRZQSMQMkx1kbJyGgekDO52E99C3LrBfMgcfFgRi08y7sx_o0kz1n_j1nXvJQz_gvXFMv9UFoHIqodNHePoMQvh9kmUa0lWnXTbBFtpctoFSTWCQ0ozPp7Rpb22pmvU9pHDzqczC5tLhCswWEDovRDMufEu8JiOEzTcvcCmYiukGGH9iHcVz86_EqhKOyaqXkVEZS0dzbanZ8R7GlMBKo233yU2ZDvWCTPYjLZXI%3D)
---

Nominating women– and particularly women of color – would render useless the Democratic Party’s narrative that Republicans are a party devoid of diversity and cater to old white men.

**DID YOU KNOW** that in our country’s 243-year history 12,343 American’s have served as members of Congress? And if you’re like me, you might be thinking, “I wonder how many women that number includes?”

Well, you’re in luck, I’ve got the answer for you: only 365 women have served in Congress, either as a U.S. Representative or U.S. Senator.

**That is UNBELIEVABLE**.

**The survey I’m requesting you take today is just three short questions but will prove immensely beneficial for me as I move forward with my congressional campaign** – and more importantly, my mission to help the Republican Party more openly embrace ethnically diverse female candidates.
[**Begin Survey Now »**](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=e51ddbccac3e405aa846fa2e0e3f2722&_e=ypO2dyGxy0GsbXTxWuLnTJIhMrx6Z6d7Ts6swZgdNV0hTw_giR3iFdziHIamPai-Lyswuyt06u_vZA-LQ3mzjC0YG3s0ZMoCv0ZWxFWGG1xusd7ksD_a7u61fpMxZeGkatsXBpERi2GmDpbsxUeLV2RgYuWPeBrqP8gmX88naq_q3N7x55oZKuYs9Sva2jkeH3QoRZQSMQMkx1kbJyGgeviHbF4ABQbBHZ-_FeUlr4L749ZnPLlZPnHU0smgxhH6guO0lSNTHLHBcBQXv5yicM3LZD3RkdJM73R4WUZ95mGq4oHNE1qzV7atbpN_u7xzj-ZNnwZxgtGWnntJIw3Sz1UcUJJz73OYcybdLYKFr0OAAExmQm5c80cVK65WNEPXrugKpx-6tuAWGzIjg3ps5ROY2uuo6XyIpvVMuKwI-pQ%3D)
---

I’m on a mission, Friend, to become the 2nd black female Republican member of Congress in our nation’s 243-year history and flip the House back to Republican control. Your responses today will go a long way toward making my goal a reality.

I'm so grateful to you, Friend

Blessings always,
[](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=e51ddbccac3e405aa846fa2e0e3f2722&_e=ypO2dyGxy0GsbXTxWuLnTJIhMrx6Z6d7Ts6swZgdNV0hTw_giR3iFdziHIamPai-Lyswuyt06u_vZA-LQ3mzjC0YG3s0ZMoCv0ZWxFWGG1xusd7ksD_a7u61fpMxZeGkatsXBpERi2GmDpbsxUeLV2RgYuWPeBrqP8gmX88naq_q3N7x55oZKuYs9Sva2jkeH3QoRZQSMQMkx1kbJyGgelwxBgCePaICg3dhaB559P__FGkNdFHHi0hS9WPSE1Am_2o48pWVJ32-fSVO4H7LutYy5V6Dt39Uyl7_CXM1oF3NWTPbUT-wT1j0FrZUufJ8pLAbUU7zsA0n3f3jl5hCLvTtiydkClWLfhENFsvsFK5m3FWduBEYCgloNdbpzmxkgVjxUgKNG8O6qd1rEZlGLbzjxr--Vhep3oMqaP5glCQ%3D)
Dr. Lerah Lee

name: Team Hern
subject: 365 Days
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HERN FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Peter Willis , One year ago, Congressman Hern took the oath of office as the new representative for Oklahoma's 1st District. Thanks to your support, it's been a huge success! Here are just _some_ of Congressman Hern's accomplishments from the past year:
* **Introduced 6 common-sense conservative bills** , one of which - the SCORE for Small Business Act - passed the House last month! Only seven freshman Republicans had a bill pass the House this year.
* **Leads marketing efforts for the House Energy Action Team** as a strong voice in support of conservative energy solutions.
* **Brought the Veterans History Project to Oklahoma,** cataloging the stories of our local veterans and preserving them at the Library of Congress for future generations.
* **Continues to build support among colleagues,** rallying around issues like cutting waste in the SNAP program, cutting red tape, and reforming the budget process.
* **Invited to join Steve Scalise 's Whip Team**, becoming a reliable voice promoting conservative issues in Congress.

In just one year, Congressman Hern has proven himself as a leader who works hard to get things done for the First District. Every day, he continues to fight for our shared conservative values. [**Will you show Congressman Hern that he has our support by chipping in now? **](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/KJ0WcH7637oL3892L5MSuDlzmQ/XxtdMLU8ge7OVxATNs8n8w/EifLwoKqSSNLfSF3u3KhcQ) With your support, 2020 will be even more successful! [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/KJ0WcH7637oL3892L5MSuDlzmQ/XxtdMLU8ge7OVxATNs8n8w/EifLwoKqSSNLfSF3u3KhcQ) Thank you, Team Hern

name: Cory Booker
subject: One dollar
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, I bet you've heard from a few candidates for president this year asking if you'd be willing to donate $1 to their campaign. Here's why: The DNC is requiring that each candidate have 200,000 individual donors in order to qualify for the December debate stage. **[Well, would you consider donating a dollar today to be one of the 200,000 donors we need? Here's a link to chip in:](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191113_CB_20191113-fr-CB-$1-ndnrs_ndnrs_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191113_CB_20191113-fr-CB-$1-ndnrs_ndnrs_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** This is a moral moment. We need to defeat Donald Trump and then begin the hard work of healing our deeply divided nation. By channeling our common pain into common purpose, we can overcome any challenge before us -- and rise together. It's this belief that's guided me throughout my career and during this election. At this point, we're fewer than 15,000 donors away from hitting 200,000. It would be a misstep for our campaign if we came so close to reaching this threshold but still fell short. **[If you believe in me and what we're fighting for in this campaign, please make your first donation of $1 today.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191113_CB_20191113-fr-CB-$1-ndnrs_ndnrs_l3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** When I'm up on that debate stage in December -- and I believe I will be -- I'll be so grateful that you were one of the people who helped me get there. Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191113_CB_20191113-fr-CB-$1-ndnrs_ndnrs_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

clean_body: | | | | Team, I bet you've heard from a few candidates for president this year asking if you'd be willing to donate $1 to their campaign. Here's why: The DNC is requiring that each candidate have 200,000 individual donors in order to qualify for the December debate stage. "=" "=" This is a moral moment. We need to defeat Donald Trump and then begin the hard work of healing our deeply divided nation. By channeling our common pain into common purpose, we can overcome any challenge before us -- and rise together. It's this belief that's guided me throughout my career and during this election. At this point, we're fewer than 15,000 donors away from hitting 200,000. It would be a misstep for our campaign if we came so close to reaching this threshold but still fell short. "=" When I'm up on that debate stage in December -- and I believe I will be -- I'll be so grateful that you were one of the people who helped me get there. Cory "=" | | Paid for by Cory 2020 P.O. We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

body:
Do you remember this? When President Trump came to Texas, and he asked for your support? Well, today may be the single most important day of his p

Friend,

Do you remember this?
When President Trump came to Texas, and he asked for your support?
Well, today may be the single most important day of his presidency. If you’ve turned on the TV, you know that as I type this, the Democrats are trying to drag the president through the mud with this ridiculous impeachment hearing.
As such, I have a critical question for you, just as he did below.
Are you an ally of President Trump?
****[YES I AM](http://links.johncornyn.com/u/click?_t=77be7e7c69cd43dfb0a9eb38fa6f500b&_m=74e524adf9774f98b9e6015f03dec4b6&_e=AUV06bHemIKob1VGShKwuj0V_ysymU8DYm1BATMcLHErQEiJvRDIHmLWGZcNJEWikMH5gjxdllyPWrsstU8O6di8zVQa9YDZ_8CXvSaKi0TtWMh0RP-KrM7IOW4Sr8bP0oZZiefFqFYY3-bGFRwLpIGzmEkGX6OomOF9o4jmnojKkzfgrO1KU6BNA2kqtGfKYekCK-aaoWYM98d7EkSoSQ3LKPM39iihwDC8am_oWG6VMVtKT344F4zSWTWlK3xqkgrNYNtY567bNkdJT-Za_9Gk6stUuWbcOQjCK2Jmb_oXFdyT_MJPn5kUNT81djdojs-HWHlpatjFytEYtod35tXQi6ug2Yl5tp1dDY4TSaX7NgMZi8EvRChDMJaBtE4INzSXQzuCb5bPNWZmK34ZbXxHfmIphR2AYLD3sNHkokHoFXWX2ymSKAPxjgvhqIz51pUjWk7SDFgLH5eyLL2JQA4RumYlzJwRqGRhH2HSdyQ%3D)** **

Friend, I know you to be a patriot, and I know you’re one of the President’s strongest advocates, which is why the next time I see him, I want to tell him that you stood by him when it mattered the most.

\----------Forwarded Message Below----------

Friend,
If you’ve paid any attention to the corrupt media recently, you will have noticed just how unfairly I’m being treated.
They claim to be unbiased, “neutral,” but you and I both know all they care about is ERASING our 2016 victory by any means necessary...
That’s why I’m getting out of DC this week and heading to Texas, where I know I have allies. And, friend, I want to know just who those allies are.
So, before I step on stage, **[I have assigned Sen. Cornyn a critical task, to gather a list of those allies so that I can personally review them.](http://links.johncornyn.com/u/click?_t=77be7e7c69cd43dfb0a9eb38fa6f500b&_m=74e524adf9774f98b9e6015f03dec4b6&_e=AUV06bHemIKob1VGShKwuj0V_ysymU8DYm1BATMcLHErQEiJvRDIHmLWGZcNJEWikMH5gjxdllyPWrsstU8O6di8zVQa9YDZ_8CXvSaKi0TtWMh0RP-KrM7IOW4Sr8bP0oZZiefFqFYY3-bGFRwLpIGzmEkGX6OomOF9o4jmnojKkzfgrO1KU6BNA2kqtGfKYekCK-aaoWYM98d7EkSoSQ3LKPM39iihwDC8am_oWG71WwNjHRUI4ivDdfvNdh8778dOaJhiBsVcbFIntqqAtByQFZqPoZ_I96hxPVCN2VnX0bzrneue_hTL9ATtMjHR6tF78XfbJZLgE5i99v8w2eE9fmv7-AORO184iiFtutIA6SQtLmDsHkS4fXMrz62hUqP2vlyJ1DddQgl-U3ujtFpE1egh9pZO4G9F1JjfUuTAJ3IRXqqwr2szztGOmOyA8odXdF0qInSjLk3qi8g6-4WKWpwevOLwD7x25xBdq0s%3D) **

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: The GOP will stop at nothing to unmask the whistleblower
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, The Republicans have always had a loose grasp on the meaning of "rule of law," especially when it comes to how it applies to them, but they're now blatantly trying to break the law to uncover the identity of the whistleblower who brought the quid pro quo to light. Leading House Republicans like Reps. Lee Zeldin and Jim Jordan are demanding the whistleblower testify publicly \-- ignoring the fact that every witness who has testified has corroborated the whistleblower's story and that whistleblowers are protected from being exposed by federal law for their own safety. It's obvious that the GOP will break any law to protect Trump, so we NEED unite against them. We need to know: **Should Democrats protect the whistleblower?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc0a/6e9863e8/164bd019/1db09a5f/992618171/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/3qbAcY_G") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc0a/6e9863e8/164bd019/1db09a5f/992618171/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/3qbAcY_G") Thank you for answering our question, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc0a/6e9863e8/164bd019/1db09a5e/992618171/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191114a.ND-b&refcode2=fr2ZrmjdBLfS2QKas3ip")

Yang Gang --

**Here’s the good news:** We’ve seen a surge in fundraising over the last 24 hours, and we’re now within striking distance of hitting our goal.

**Here’s the not-so-good news:** We only have 7 hours left, and right now we’re still short of reaching our goal. Honestly, we might not hit it.

Andrew’s place on the December debate stage is on the line, so it’s really important that we hit this goal. We’ll be able to extend our TV ad campaign statewide in Iowa for another week, reaching voters who will get us the last two polls we need to qualify.

If we don’t, we’ll need to cut back at the worst possible moment -- and at this point in the race, we can’t afford to let that happen.

**If every person reading this email chips in $5 or more right now, we’ll easily hit our goal.**

[Andrew doesn’t have big dollar donors -- only you can help us reach our goal. Please, Yang Gang, chip in what you can before the clock runs out at midnight. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16710?t=7&akid=3087%2E377263%2EhWYu3R)
[Chip in](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16710?t=6&akid=3087%2E377263%2EhWYu3R)
---
Thanks for everything you do,

Yang2020
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16710?t=14&akid=3087%2E377263%2EhWYu3R)

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: BREAKING: Collins votes to confirm man behind Trump's family separation policy
body:
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f15/4bef7a87/6bfd7e16/287fcb0e/3034829347/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

**BREAKING: Collins votes to confirm the man behind Trump's family separation policy**
Friends,
Susan Collins just voted to confirm Chad Wolf - the architect behind Trump's family separation policy - as Undersecretary for the Department of Homeland Security.
Instead of holding the Trump Administration accountable for their inhumane policy, Collins is promoting the man who helped create the awful situation at our border.
**She proved _yet again_ that she is nothing more than another vote for Trump and McConnell in the Senate. It's time for her to go:**
[**Rush a $3 contribution to Sara Gideon 's campaign right away. Together, we can defeat Susan Collins and elect a real leader to the U.S. Senate.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f15/4bef7a87/6bfd7e16/287fcb0d/3034829347/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMTMtMi1iIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-november?refcode=em191113-2-b")
Collins' approval rating is lower than ever. **The last poll had a Democrat up by 3 points.** We CAN beat her and STOP Senate Republicans from confirming any more unqualified and dangerous nominees like Chad Wolf.
\- Team Sara

name: Team Tina
subject: Three things
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Our opponent was handpicked by Donald Trump to run against Tina. Here are a few more things you need to know about him...

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191113-three?refcode=em191113-three&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Team --

Here are three quick things you need to know about Tina's Republican opponent in this race:

1\. Jason Lewis was handpicked by Trump to run against Tina -- he's even been called Minnesota's "Mini-Trump" and received the president's endorsement at a rally last month.

2\. As a former congressman, Lewis sided with powerful special interests over the people of Minnesota time and again -- voting to gut protections for people with pre-existing conditions, giving tax breaks to the wealthy and big corporations, and more.

3\. To make matters worse, Lewis is also a climate change denier, opposes gun safety reform, and has a long history of offensive views on women, people of color, and the LGBTQ+ community.

Minnesotans deserve better than a Senator who will throw them under the bus and never look back. That's why we're doing whatever it takes to make sure Tina is re-elected next year -- and why we're asking you:

**Can you chip in whatever you can to support Tina's re-election campaign before our mid-month deadline? This is a must-win seat if Democrats are going to take back the Senate majority, and your contribution today will make a meaningful difference in our race.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191113-three?refcode=em191113-three&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

Tina's fighting for the issues that matter most to Minnesota families every day she's in the Senate: protecting our health care, defending reproductive freedom, getting big money out of politics, lowering the cost of prescription drugs, and so much more. She's exactly the kind of leader we need in Washington.

Let's make sure Tina stays put.

-- Team Tina

Friend, **Today, we are closer to impeaching this lawless president than ever before.** The start of public impeachment hearings is a significant step forward in restoring transparency and accountability to our government. I am hopeful that these hearings will show people the facts, and force Republicans to listen to their constituents and recognize that no one is above the law — not even the president. **After two years of organizing together, the American people will finally see Mr. Trump’s crimes brought to light. When we all work together to protect our democracy, the American people win. That’s why, over two years ago, I went against the political mainstream and founded Need to Impeach — a grassroots movement of more than 8.3 million people committed to holding Mr. Trump accountable. Today is a testament to the notion that when we stand together in search of truth, we win — and that organizing can move our country forward. That’s the core belief that’s behind my run for president, and it’s why I’m asking you to keep organizing with me through 2020. Thank you for standing for what is right, Tom

clean_body: | | | | Friend, Today, we are closer to impeaching this lawless president than ever before. The start of public impeachment hearings is a significant step forward in restoring transparency and accountability to our government. I am hopeful that these hearings will show people the facts, and force Republicans to listen to their constituents and recognize that no one is above the law — not even the president. After two years of organizing together, the American people will finally see Mr. Trump’s crimes brought to light. This is what happens when we’re united. subject: Mark's Republican opponents want to flip Virginia red
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
One of Mark's Republican opponents is asking his supporters for help to "defend the Senate Majority."
|
---
| | Derek,

One of Mark's Republican opponents is asking his supporters for help to "defend the Senate Majority." **Like Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell, Mark's Republican opponents want to flip Virginia red** so they can maintain the Trump GOP's hold on power -- and it's our job to stop them. | ****[RUSH A DONATION TO
HELP MARK FIGHT BACK](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d7de/53d9897e/522375b7/1c891f49/1037980663/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMzNCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-majority?refcode=20191113nd__334__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")****
---
The truth is that if we want a Democratic majority in the Senate in January 2021, we _have_ to reelect Mark here in the Commonwealth. **But we can't take anything for granted -- not with the Trump campaign expanding its Virginia operations from its headquarters in our own backyard!**

The stakes are too high to fall short. **If Trump wins Virginia and defeats Mark in the process, it will be a disaster** for our healthcare, our economy, our foreign policy and more.

We're working hard to make sure that doesn't happen, but we have a lot of doors to knock on and phone calls to make between now and Election Day. **Will you make a donation right now to help us keep Virginia's Senate seat blue?**
